title: erigeron benghalensis
intro: Erigeron benghalensis, also known as Fleabane or Ajamoda, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Erigeron benghalensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant include its use in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in the form of essential oils and powders.
